down.temporalRule: monotonic loss of support into stable unconscious hold
down.koExpression: visible unfocused spiral eye; no smile, sleep expression, or X eye

revive.temporalRule: exact KO hold then monotonic recovery without standing-sinking-standing regression
revive.startContinuity: revive-1 exact RGBA equals same-view down-8
